title: Can't get past preview "You are about to visit"
excerpt: Even when I click “Visit Site”, it’s just like a refresh. Any ideas? The tunnel works if I open the URL in a separate window, just not in the Monday preview pane.

Even when I click “Visit Site”, it’s just like a refresh. Any ideas? The tunnel works if I open the URL in a separate window, just not in the Monday preview pane.
